title: bidens pseudocosmos
intro: Bidens pseudocosmos, also known as False Cosmos, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family and native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating inflammation and digestive issues, due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Studies have shown that Bidens pseudocosmos extracts possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits for conditions such as arthritis, digestive disorders, and skin irritations. Bidens pseudocosmos can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in different ways.
